title: Micme configuration
description: Machine-level Micme settings. Shell environment variables override saved values.

MICME_TRANSCRIBE_BACKEND.description: Select transcription backend. auto preserves priority: custom command, whisper.cpp, then Python Whisper.

MICME_DEFAULT_WHISPER_CPP_MODEL.description: whisper.cpp model name mapped to MICME_MODEL_DIR/ggml-<name>.bin unless MICME_WHISPER_CPP_MODEL is set.

MICME_WHISPER_CPP_MODEL.description: Advanced whisper.cpp exact ggml/gguf model path override. When set, it wins over MICME_DEFAULT_WHISPER_CPP_MODEL.

MICME_WHISPER_CPP_BIN.description: Command or path for whisper.cpp clip transcription. Leave unset to find whisper-cli/whisper-cpp on PATH.

MICME_WHISPER_MODEL.description: Model name passed to the OpenAI Whisper Python CLI when the Python backend is used.

MICME_STREAM_KEEP_CONTEXT.description: Pass --keep-context to whisper-stream. Defaults to off for append-only dictation.

MICME_STREAM_FINALIZE_WITH_CLIP.description: When enabled, stop-time clip transcription may replace the append-only live stream transcript.

MICME_STREAM_FLUSH_MS.description: Quiet interval in milliseconds before tentative stream words are committed append-only.

MICME_RECORD_COMMAND.description: Advanced shell command hook. Use only trusted commands.

MICME_TRANSCRIBE_COMMAND.description: Advanced custom transcription shell command. Use only trusted commands; Micme cannot inspect which model it uses.

^MICME_.description: Micme runtime setting. Values are read as strings by Micme.
